headline: Buy, Hold, or Sell: Wall Street Fears Tech Compression, but This AI Storage Monster Has a Hidden Weapon
summary: At $1,031.34, Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) looks fully valued, with a more attractive risk/reward profile only emerging on a macro-driven pullback toward $850. The stock just hit a fresh 52-week high on analyst target hikes, even as Wall Street braces for tighter Fed policy that could compress high-multiple tech names. headline: The Billionaire Who Called the 2008 Bubble Just Dumped Google to Buy These 5 AI Hardware Stocks
summary: Stanley Druckenmiller sold his entire Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) stake in the first quarter of 2026 and rotated the proceeds into SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK), Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX), Micron Technology (NASDAQ:MU), Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO), and Arm Holdings (NASDAQ:ARM).
